name: Bid Wall Absorption (Momentum)
hypothesis: The parent spec (iter004_bbo_reversal_on_tradeflow) failed with WR=18%, suggesting an inverted signal. This spec tests the opposite hypothesis: strong bid-side pressure (high obi_1) successfully absorbs selling flow (negative trade imbalance), acting as support confirmation and predicting a price INCREASE (momentum continuation).
mutation_note: Inverting the logic of the parent spec based on feedback that its 18% WR indicated a direction flip. Changed 'direction' from long_if_neg to long_if_pos and shortened horizon to 10 ticks to capture the immediate post-absorption bounce.
